data.title: First Majestic to Spend $75 Million in 2026 to Restart Jerritt Canyon Gold Mine by Late 2027
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

First Majestic Silver ( (TSE:AG) ) just unveiled an announcement.

On April 2, 2026, First Majestic Silver announced a detailed restart plan for its 100%-owned Jerritt Canyon Gold Mine in Nevada, which has been on care and maintenance since March 2023. The company aims to resume gold production in the second half of 2027, underpinned by a newly expanded mineral resource base totaling 4.1 million ounces of measured and indicated gold and 3.7 million ounces of inferred resources as of December 31, 2025.

First Majestic plans to invest $75 million in 2026 to rehabilitate underground operations, advance open-pit potential, upgrade the processing plant, expand drilling and bolster staffing, supported by a pre-feasibility study from Stantec due in Q4 2026. The restart strategy, which follows the completed integration of Gatos Silver, is intended to optimize long-term, low-cost production in a strong gold price environment and could enhance the company’s growth profile and value proposition for investors if execution and market conditions align.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:AG) stock is a Buy with a C$33.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on First Majestic Silver stock, see the TSE:AG Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on AG Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, AG is a Outperform.

The score is driven primarily by improved 2025 financial performance and a constructive earnings-call outlook (strong cash, free-cash-flow momentum, and growth plans). Offsetting factors are a weaker near-term technical picture and a demanding P/E despite the high dividend yield.

To see Spark’s full report on AG stock, click here.

More about First Majestic Silver

First Majestic Silver Corp. is a precious metals producer focused on silver and gold, with listings in New York, Toronto and Frankfurt. The company owns the Jerritt Canyon Gold Mine in Nevada, a fully permitted operation with one of the few roasting gold processing plants in the state and a large, largely underexplored land package hosting significant measured, indicated and inferred gold resources.

Average Trading Volume: 2,327,065

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: C$15.17B

data.title: Sichuan Expressway Sets Out Board Line-Up and Committee Roles
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Sichuan Expressway Co ( (HK:0107) ) has provided an announcement.

Sichuan Expressway Company Limited has announced the current composition of its board of directors, detailing the roles of executive, non-executive, independent non-executive and an employee director, with Chairman Luo Zuyi and Vice Chairmen You Zhiming and Yang Shaojun among the key figures. The company also confirmed the structure of four core board committees—Audit, Strategy and Sustainable Development, Nomination, and Remuneration and Appraisal—clarifying leadership and membership in a move that enhances transparency around its corporate governance framework for shareholders and regulators.

Executive director and company secretary Yao Jiancheng formally issued the updated list from Chengdu on 2 April 2026, underscoring the company’s emphasis on clearly delineated oversight responsibilities as it manages its expressway operations. The announcement signals continuity and structure in board oversight, which is likely to support stakeholder confidence in the company’s risk management, strategic planning and remuneration policies as it operates within China’s regulated transport infrastructure market.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:0107) stock is a Hold with a HK$5.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Sichuan Expressway Co stock, see the HK:0107 Stock Forecast page.

More about Sichuan Expressway Co

Sichuan Expressway Company Limited is a PRC-based operator in the transportation infrastructure sector, focused on the investment, construction, operation and management of expressways in Sichuan Province. The company is listed in Hong Kong and is overseen by a board comprising executive, non-executive, independent non-executive and employee directors, reflecting a diversified governance structure aligned with listed company standards.

data.title: Hemlo Mining Clears $75 Million Credit Line After Hemlo Mine Acquisition
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Hemlo Mining ( (TSE:HMMC) ) has provided an announcement.

Hemlo Mining Corp. has fully repaid the $75 million drawn under its $100 million revolving credit facility, eliminating the outstanding balance while keeping the line available for future corporate and working capital needs. The move follows the November 2025 draw used to help fund the Hemlo Gold Mine acquisition and leaves the company with roughly $125 million in cash alongside a remaining $150 million term loan due in quarterly instalments through late 2028.

Management frames the swift repayment, completed less than six months after the mine purchase, as evidence of strong cash flow generation from the Hemlo Gold Mine and a disciplined approach to deleveraging. The balance-sheet strengthening supports the company’s 2026 focus on operational optimization and growth, potentially improving financial flexibility and risk profile for lenders and shareholders as Hemlo seeks to maximize value from its flagship asset.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:HMMC) stock is a Buy with a C$12.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Hemlo Mining stock, see the TSE:HMMC Stock Forecast page.

More about Hemlo Mining

Hemlo Mining Corp. is a Canadian gold producer focused on operating and enhancing the Hemlo gold camp in northwestern Ontario. Its flagship Hemlo Gold Mine, an underground and open pit operation that has produced about 25 million ounces of gold since 1985, is being advanced under a strategy aimed at improving operating efficiency, growing production and extending mine life.

Average Trading Volume: 456,983

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: C$1.92B

data.title: Flutter’s Alfred Hurley to Retire from Board, Nancy Dubuc to Lead Key Committee
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

An update from Flutter Entertainment PLC ( (FLUT) ) is now available.

Flutter Entertainment plc announced that independent director Alfred F. Hurley, Jr., who has served on the board since June 2016, will retire and not stand for re-election at the company’s 2026 Annual General Meeting on May 29, 2026. The board highlighted Hurley’s contributions, particularly during Flutter’s U.S. listing transition and his leadership of the Compensation and Human Resources Committee.

Following the Annual General Meeting, Nancy Dubuc will assume the role of Chair of the Compensation and Human Resources Committee, succeeding Hurley in this key governance position. The transition underscores an orderly refresh of Flutter’s board leadership, signaling continuity in oversight of executive pay and human capital matters for investors and other stakeholders.

More about Flutter Entertainment PLC

Flutter Entertainment plc is a global gambling and online sports betting group that operates across multiple markets. The company focuses on regulated gaming and wagering services, offering digital betting platforms to consumers in jurisdictions including the U.S. and Europe. It is listed in the U.S. and has a broad shareholder base and international governance structure.

For a thorough assessment of FLUT stock, go to TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

An update from China Baoli Technologies Holdings Ltd. ( (HK:0164) ) is now available.

China Baoli Technologies Holdings has issued a supplemental announcement clarifying the identities of investors participating in its previously announced subscriptions of new shares under a general mandate. data.title: Clearway Energy Updates Exchange Agreement and Equity Structure
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

An update from Clearway Energy ( (CWEN) ) is now available.

On April 1, 2026, Clearway Energy, Inc., Clearway Energy LLC and Clearway Energy Group LLC amended and restated their existing exchange agreement, updating the mechanics governing how Clearway Energy Group and related unitholders can convert their LLC units into Clearway Energy equity. The Third Amended and Restated Exchange Agreement now permits holders of Class B units in Clearway Energy LLC to exchange those units on a one-for-one basis for Class C common stock of Clearway Energy, instead of Class A common stock, with a corresponding number of Class B common shares being extinguished, a change that fine-tunes the company’s equity structure and may affect the mix and voting profile of its publicly traded share classes over time.

The most recent analyst rating on (CWEN) stock is a Buy with a $44.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Clearway Energy stock, see the CWEN Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on CWEN Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, CWEN is a Neutral.

The score is held back primarily by balance-sheet leverage and some earnings/cash-flow volatility, despite steady revenue growth and solid operating cash generation. The latest earnings call was a key positive, with reiterated CAFD guidance, strong commercialization progress, and clear long-term per-share targets. Technically the trend is improving versus longer-term averages, while valuation is supported by the dividend but tempered by a mid-20s P/E.

To see Spark’s full report on CWEN stock, click here.

More about Clearway Energy

Clearway Energy, Inc., a U.S.-based power company, operates through Clearway Energy LLC and partners with Clearway Energy Group LLC, focusing on owning and managing contracted renewable energy and conventional generation assets. Its capital structure includes multiple classes of common stock and corresponding LLC units, reflecting a complex ownership and exchange framework for its equity holders.

data.title: Braskem Signs BRL 226 Million Related-Party Steam Supply Deal for Cubatão Plant
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Braskem SA ( (BAK) ) has provided an announcement.

On March 23, 2026, Braskem entered into a related-party agreement with Petrocoque S.A. Indústria e Comércio, a company jointly controlled by Petrobras, for the purchase of steam to supply Braskem’s PE8 plant in Cubatão, São Paulo. The contract, effective from March 25, 2026, to March 24, 2031 and extendable to 2033, has an estimated total value of BRL 226 million and secures a critical energy input from Petrocoque, the only available supplier in the region.

Braskem’s management stated that, despite the related-party nature of the deal, no representatives of Petrocoque or its shareholders took part in Braskem’s internal decision-making, and a competitiveness analysis concluded that the agreed steam prices align with market conditions at other units. The long-term supply arrangement underpins operational continuity at the Cubatão PE8 unit while addressing governance and pricing concerns that are often scrutinized in related-party transactions, which may help reassure investors and regulators about the transaction’s fairness.

The most recent analyst rating on (BAK) stock is a Hold with a $3.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Braskem SA stock, see the BAK Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on BAK Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, BAK is a Neutral.

BAK scores low primarily due to very weak financial performance—losses, negative/volatile cash generation, and a highly stressed balance sheet with negative equity and heavy leverage. Technical indicators also point to soft near-term momentum. The earnings call provides some mitigation via liquidity and executed cost actions, but restructuring/regulatory uncertainty and a difficult industry backdrop keep the overall risk profile elevated, while valuation is hard to justify given negative earnings and no dividend data.

To see Spark’s full report on BAK stock, click here.

More about Braskem SA

Braskem S.A. is a Brazilian petrochemical company that operates large industrial complexes producing resins and other chemical products for clients in sectors such as packaging, automotive, construction, and consumer goods. The company is a key player in Latin America’s petrochemical industry and maintains plants in several Brazilian states, including São Paulo and Bahia.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: $1.31B

data.title: Valsoia’s Audit Board List Confirmed as Only Controlling Shareholder Slate
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Valsoia SpA ( (IT:VLS) ) just unveiled an update.

Valsoia S.p.A. announced that the deadline for submitting candidate lists for its Board of Statutory Auditors expired on 2 April 2026 without any additional lists being presented by shareholders. As a result, the only valid list is the one filed by controlling shareholder Finsalute S.r.l., which has already been published and is available on the company’s website and via the authorized storage mechanism.

This outcome effectively grants Finsalute S.r.l. decisive influence over the composition of Valsoia’s Board of Statutory Auditors, reinforcing the controlling shareholder’s role in the company’s oversight structure. The process underlines a limited level of contestation or alternative governance proposals from minority investors, which may shape the balance of power and oversight dynamics within the company’s corporate governance framework.

The most recent analyst rating on (IT:VLS) stock is a Buy with a EUR13.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Valsoia SpA stock, see the IT:VLS Stock Forecast page.

More about Valsoia SpA

Valsoia S.p.A., based in Bologna, operates in the food industry and is known for its health-oriented and plant-based products in the Italian market. The company targets consumers seeking nutritionally balanced and alternative food options, and it is controlled by the shareholder Finsalute S.r.l., which has a significant influence over its corporate governance.
